subject: session date
fact: The session date is February 8th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Feb 8th, 2026

subject: Daein
fact: Daein created an illusion of a female hellhound to lure male hellhounds.
source_quote: Daein created an illusion of a female hellhound to lure male hellhounds.

subject: Daein
fact: Daein mimicked the fire giant's voice with auditory illusions to maintain surprise.
source_quote: Daein mimicked the fire giant's voice with auditory illusions to maintain surprise

subject: Daein
fact: Daein was critically hit by a fire giant for 50 points of damage, which he reduced to 45.
source_quote: A fire giant critically hit Daein for 50 points of damage, which Daein reduced to 45.

subject: Daein
fact: Daein killed an ogre and struck the giant twice with an axe while winking at Bramgrim.
source_quote: Daein killed an ogre and struck the giant twice with an axe while winking at Bramgrim.

subject: Daein
fact: Daein dealt 41 hit points of damage to Ogre #2.
source_quote: Daein attacked Ogre #2, dealing 41 hit points of damage.

subject: Daein
fact: Daein finished off Ogre #4 with a critical hit.
source_quote: Daein finished off Ogre #4 with a critical hit.

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas critically struck the fire giant sergeant with her oath-sworn bow, dealing over 50 points of damage.
source_quote: Akritas critically struck the fire giant sergeant with her oath-sworn bow, dealing over 50 points of damage.

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas killed the fire giant sergeant.
source_quote: Akritas killed the fire giant sergeant.

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas finished off Ogre #2 with her bow and Hunter's Mark, dealing 38 hit points.
source_quote: Akritas finished off Ogre #2 with her bow and Hunter's Mark, dealing 38 hit points.

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas killed Ogre #3 with her bow and Hunter's Mark, dealing 38 hit points.
source_quote: Akritas killed Ogre #3 with her bow and Hunter's Mark, dealing 38 hit points.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim engaged with spirit guardians.
source_quote: Bramgrim engaged with spirit guardians.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim lost concentration on spirit guardians after being struck by an ogre.
source_quote: Bramgrim lost concentration on spirit guardians after being struck by an ogre.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Silence to prevent alarms at the well.
source_quote: Bramgrim cast Silence to prevent alarms at the well

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast mass healing word and dealt 27 points of necrotic damage.
source_quote: Bramgrim, shamed by Daein's relentless offensive, relented his healing-only stance to cast mass healing word and dealt 27 points of necrotic damage.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim attempted to negotiate with the imp during combat.
source_quote: Bramgrim attempted to negotiate with the imp during combat.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used MageHand to strip ogres of their uniforms, causing distraction.
source_quote: Felkur used MageHand to strip ogres of their uniforms, causing distraction.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur initiated combat with a fireball on ogres and targeted giants with a cannon.
source_quote: Felkur initiated combat with a fireball on ogres and targeted giants with a cannon.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used Arcana to recall that faerzress is a dimension-controlling substance.
source_quote: Felkur used Arcana to recall that faerzress is a dimension-controlling substance that provides illumination and blocks teleportation.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur cast Fireball, hitting Ogres #1, #3, and #4 for 28 damage each.
source_quote: Felkur cast Fireball, hitting Ogres #1, #3, and #4 for 28 damage each

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used another spell to hit Ogre #3 for 16 damage.
source_quote: and then used another spell to hit Ogre #3 for 16 damage

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used a firebolt to finish off the last remaining Ogre #1.
source_quote: Felkur used a firebolt to finish off the last remaining Ogre #1.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear finished off ogres.
source_quote: The Owlbear finished off ogres.

subject: Owlbear
fact: Bramgrim and Felkur rode on the Owlbear's back to navigate the five-foot depth of the well.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Felkur—both too short to comfortably navigate the five-foot depth—riding on the Owlbear's back.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear attacked Ogre #4, dealing 18 hit points.
source_quote: The Owlbear attacked Ogre #4, dealing 18 hit points.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was attacked by Ogre #3 for 13 points of damage.
source_quote: Ogre #3 attacked the Owlbear for 13 points of damage.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear attacked Ogre #1, dealing 35 hit points.
source_quote: The Owlbear attacked Ogre #1, dealing 35 hit points.

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap is an imp who was rescued from four ogres.
source_quote: The rescued imp introduced himself as Pipyap

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap complained about the lack of salt in the party's provisions.
source_quote: You should put some salt. It goes a lot better with salt.

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap was brought to the prime material plane by a magic user's mistake.
source_quote: Pipyap revealed he had been brought to the prime material plane by a magic user's mistake

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak was a drow wizard who worked to subvert the power of Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra.
source_quote: they learned that the drow wizard had been working to subvert the power of Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink.
source_quote: Solom blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak's notes mentioned that Lolth's clerics suddenly regained their powers after the Blink.
source_quote: The notes also mentioned that Lolth's clerics, who had been curiously silent and unable to commune with Lolth, suddenly regained their powers after the Blink.

subject: Hledh
fact: Hledh is the Fire Giant Queen who resides in the eastern castle.
source_quote: an eastern castle with towers stretching to the ceiling housed the Fire Giant Queen Hledh

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fiendish giant who runs the Coliseum and its betting operations.
source_quote: Veperyd, who ran the Coliseum and its betting operations

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a Yugoloth who lives in the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: the residence of Vraxen, a Yugoloth who lived in the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Lolth
fact: Lolth used the Blink event to escape her imprisonment.
source_quote: Lolth herself had used the event to escape her imprisonment

subject: Lolth
fact: Lolth is now reestablishing her dominion over her followers.
source_quote: and was now reestablishing her dominion over her followers.

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Maerimydra is controlled by demonic forces aligned with the demon lord Graz'zt.
source_quote: controlled by demonic forces aligned with the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Graz'zt
fact: The western plateau bears the six-fingered symbol of Graz'zt.
source_quote: a western plateau bore the six-fingered symbol of Graz'zt

subject: Fire Giants
fact: Fire giants patrol the streets of Maerimydra.
source_quote: its streets patrolled by fire giants

subject: Drow
fact: Drow in Maerimydra have been reduced to chains and slavery.
source_quote: with drow reduced to chains and slavery.

subject: Menzoberranzan
fact: Solom Ned'razak blamed wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink.
source_quote: blaming powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the catastrophe.

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Bramgrim recalled that Hillsfar had been controlled by Graz'zt.
source_quote: Bramgrim recalled that Hillsfar had been controlled by Graz'zt

subject: Mulmaster
fact: A wizard from Mulmaster arrived for dinner at Vraxen's residence.
source_quote: a wizard from Mulmaster had arrived for dinner at the residence of Vraxen

subject: Black Ember Outpost assault
fact: The party completed an assault on the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: having just completed a daring assault that began with tactical mischief and ended in swift brutality.

subject: Hellhound escape
fact: A third hellhound escaped out of the outpost.
source_quote: a third escaped out of the outpost.

subject: Track staging
fact: Daein staged a scene making the dead ogres and fire giant appear to be still alive.
source_quote: Daein successfully staged the scene using deception, making it appear as if the dead ogres and fire giant were still alive

subject: Well descent
fact: The party plunged into the dark, murky waters of the well.
source_quote: The party plunged into the dark, murky waters of the well

subject: Tunnel swim
fact: The party swam through a tunnel for about forty feet.
source_quote: They swam through a tunnel for about forty feet

subject: Blink event
fact: The Blink caused all the faerzress to flicker dramatically before returning to normal.
source_quote: This phenomenon had caused all the faerzress—a dimension-controlling substance that provides illumination and blocks teleportation—to flicker dramatically before returning to normal

subject: Demon appearance
fact: Demons began appearing throughout the Underdark after the Blink.
source_quote: after which demons began appearing throughout the Underdark.

subject: Lolth's escape
fact: Lolth used the Blink to escape her imprisonment.
source_quote: Lolth herself had used the event to escape her imprisonment

subject: Imp rescue
fact: The party intervened to rescue an imp being tormented by four ogres.
source_quote: they ultimately decided the potential intelligence was worth the risk.

subject: Ogre combat
fact: The party engaged the ogres in combat.
source_quote: The party engaged the ogres in combat.

subject: Ogre #2 death
fact: Akritas finished off Ogre #2.
source_quote: Akritas finished off Ogre #2 with her bow and Hunter's Mark, dealing 38 hit points.

subject: Ogre #4 death
fact: Daein finished off Ogre #4 with a critical hit.
source_quote: Daein finished off Ogre #4 with a critical hit.

subject: Ogre #3 death
fact: Akritas killed Ogre #3.
source_quote: Akritas killed Ogre #3 with her bow and Hunter's Mark, dealing 38 hit points.

subject: Ogre #1 death
fact: Felkur used a firebolt to finish off the last remaining Ogre #1.
source_quote: Felkur used a firebolt to finish off the last remaining Ogre #1.

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The party stood victorious over the carnage at the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: The party stood victorious over the carnage at the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Path of the Shadows
fact: The path forward was down a well on the Path of the Shadows.
source_quote: The path forward, on the Path of the Shadows, was down a well.

subject: Solom Ned'razak's office
fact: The party emerged into a large cave that served as Solom Ned'razak's private office.
source_quote: emerging into a large cave that served as Solom Ned'razak's private office.

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is a city of fire and ash nestled in a titanic cavern six hundred feet tall.
source_quote: a city of fire and ash nestled in a titanic cavern six hundred feet tall.

subject: Western plateau
fact: The western plateau bears the six-fingered symbol of Graz'zt above a courtyard.
source_quote: a western plateau bore the six-fingered symbol of Graz'zt above a courtyard

subject: Eastern castle
fact: An eastern castle with towers stretching to the ceiling houses the Fire Giant Queen Hledh.
source_quote: an eastern castle with towers stretching to the ceiling housed the Fire Giant Queen Hledh

subject: Coliseum
fact: A massive coliseum looms in the southern district of Maerimydra.
source_quote: a massive coliseum loomed in the southern district.

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning houses a book the party needs to steal and a teleportation circle.
source_quote: the same tower that housed both the book the party needed to steal and a teleportation circle they could use to escape.

subject: Hidden chest
fact: The party discovered a hidden chest containing potions and gemstones.
source_quote: discovered a hidden chest containing potions of flying and fire giant strength, along with coral gemstones

subject: Potion of flying
fact: The party found a potion of flying in the hidden chest.
source_quote: discovered a hidden chest containing potions of flying

subject: Potion of fire giant strength
fact: The party found a potion of fire giant strength in the hidden chest.
source_quote: containing potions of flying and fire giant strength

subject: Coral gemstones
fact: The party found coral gemstones worth 400 gold pieces.
source_quote: coral gemstones worth 400 gold pieces.

subject: Bloodstained satchel
fact: The imp was desperately clutching a bloodstained satchel.
source_quote: an imp desperately clutching a bloodstained satchel.

subject: Oath-sworn bow
fact: Akritas landed a critical hit with her oath-sworn bow.
source_quote: Akritas landed a staggering critical hit with her oath-sworn bow

subject: Lamp
fact: The party found a lamp in Solom Ned'razak's office.
source_quote: The party found a lamp and papers in Solom Ned'razak's office.

subject: Solom's notes
fact: The party read Solom Ned'razak's notes in his office.
source_quote: Among the papers and notes scattered about, they learned

subject: Book
fact: The party needs to steal a book from Vraxen's residence.
source_quote: the book the party needed to steal

subject: Teleportation circle
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning houses a teleportation circle.
source_quote: a teleportation circle they could use to escape.

subject: Fire giant
fact: Fire giants patrol the streets of Maerimydra.
source_quote: its streets patrolled by fire giants

subject: Armored ogres
fact: Armored ogres patrol the streets of Maerimydra.
source_quote: armored ogres, hellhounds, and demons of all varieties

subject: Hellhounds
fact: Two hellhounds were killed at the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: Two hellhounds were killed, while a third escaped out of the outpost.

subject: Demons
fact: Demons began appearing throughout the Underdark after the Blink.
source_quote: after which demons began appearing throughout the Underdark.

subject: Ogre #1
fact: Ogre #1 attacked Daein but missed.
source_quote: Ogre #1 attacked Daein but missed.

subject: Ogre #2
fact: Ogre #2 was finished off by Akritas.
source_quote: Akritas finished off Ogre #2 with her bow and Hunter's Mark, dealing 38 hit points.

subject: Ogre #3
fact: Ogre #3 attacked the Owlbear for 13 points of damage.
source_quote: Ogre #3 attacked the Owlbear for 13 points of damage.

subject: Ogre #4
fact: Ogre #4 charged Daein, hitting for 13 points of damage.
source_quote: Ogre #4 charged Daein, hitting for 13 points of damage

subject: Fire giant sergeant
fact: Akritas critically struck the fire giant sergeant, dealing over 50 points of damage.
source_quote: Akritas critically struck the fire giant sergeant with her oath-sworn bow, dealing over 50 points of damage.

subject: Fire giant
fact: A fire giant critically hit Daein for 50 points of damage.
source_quote: A fire giant critically hit Daein for 50 points of damage

subject: Fire giant
fact: Akritas delivered the finishing blow to the fire giant.
source_quote: Akritas delivered the finishing blow to the fire giant, securing the room.

subject: Dinner at Vraxen's
fact: A wizard from Mulmaster is arriving for dinner at Vraxen's residence.
source_quote: a wizard from Mulmaster had arrived for dinner at the residence of Vraxen

subject: The Blink
fact: The Blink was an event where all faerzress in the Underdark went dark, then very brightly lit, then dark again, then normal again.
source_quote: The Blink was an event where all faerzress in the Underdark went dark, then very brightly lit, then dark again, then normal again

subject: Lolth's return
fact: Lolth has returned to reestablish her power in the world.
source_quote: Lolth herself had used the event to escape her imprisonment and was now reestablishing her dominion over her followers.
